class.name: PlayFabCatalog
class.description: Accessed through [code]PlayFab.catalog[/code]. This generated service wraps client-safe PlayFab catalog item, config, review, search, and moderation APIs from the GDK PlayFab Services SDK. Methods require a signed-in [PlayFabUser], accept an optional request [Dictionary] using snake_case PlayFab field names, and return a completion [Signal] that emits [PlayFabResult]. Result payloads are converted to Godot Dictionaries and Arrays.

method.name: create_draft_item_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFCatalogCreateDraftItem[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: create_upload_urls_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFCatalogCreateUploadUrls[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: delete_entity_item_reviews_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFCatalogDeleteEntityItemReviews[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: delete_item_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFCatalogDeleteItem[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: get_catalog_config_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFCatalogGetCatalogConfig[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_draft_item_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFCatalogGetDraftItem[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_draft_items_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFCatalogGetDraftItems[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_entity_draft_items_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFCatalogGetEntityDraftItems[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_entity_item_review_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFCatalogGetEntityItemReview[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_item_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFCatalogGetItem[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_item_containers_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFCatalogGetItemContainers[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_item_moderation_state_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFCatalogGetItemModerationState[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_item_publish_status_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFCatalogGetItemPublishStatus[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_item_reviews_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFCatalogGetItemReviews[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_item_review_summary_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFCatalogGetItemReviewSummary[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_items_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFCatalogGetItems[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: publish_draft_item_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFCatalogPublishDraftItem[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: report_item_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFCatalogReportItem[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: report_item_review_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFCatalogReportItemReview[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: review_item_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFCatalogReviewItem[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: search_items_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFCatalogSearchItems[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: set_item_moderation_state_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFCatalogSetItemModerationState[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: submit_item_review_vote_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFCatalogSubmitItemReviewVote[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: takedown_item_reviews_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFCatalogTakedownItemReviews[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: update_catalog_config_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFCatalogUpdateCatalogConfig[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: update_draft_item_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFCatalogUpdateDraftItem[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.
